item.title: LFOT METAR/TAF
item.description:
🟢 METAR LFOT 100700Z AUTO 09004KT 060V120 CAVOK 15/13 Q1009 NOSIG
🟡 TAF LFOT 100500Z 1006/1106 VRB05KT CAVOK PROB40 TEMPO 1010/1021 18010KT 4000 SHRA BKN050TCU PROB40 TEMPO 1015/1020 VRB10G25KT 2700 TSRA BKN035CB PROB40 TEMPO 1023/1106 23010KT BKN008 PROB30 TEMPO 1105/1106 02010KT SHRA BKN012 BKN020TCU
